speaker: speaker1
text: Good evening , madam . Can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I bought this sheet here yesterday .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . When I spread it out back home , I found this hole .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , how awful ! May I have a look at the invoice ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well . please accept our sincere apologies , I'll be glad to change it for another one if you wish .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's very kind of you . Thank you .

speaker: speaker1
text: We're sorry that this has happened , and I guarantee that the same mistake won't happen again .
